packages/shared-types.role: Schema source of truth — AICandidate, SerumState, panelist IDs.

packages/shared-engine.role: Preset logic, triad, TS gates (Undercover/Slavic), SOE, integrity, Aji, schism, perf boss, arbitration.

packages/fxp-encoder.role: Rust→WASM Serum preset bytes — behind validated serum-offset-map (HARD GATE).

packages/serum2-encoder.role: Serum 2 encode path — same offset discipline as fxp-encoder family.

packages/shared-ui.role: Shared React/Tailwind surfaces for web + future shells.

apps/web-app.role: Next.js App Router — triad routes, health, Mercury UI, browser WASM export hook.

apps/mobile-app.role: Expo shell — operator stance until API parity (brain fusion mobile line).
